name: Rahul
summary: Backend and platform engineer with 5+ years of experience building secure, cloud-native distributed systems using Go, Python, FastAPI, Kubernetes, AWS, and GCP. Skilled in platform APIs, observability, automation, developer tooling, and AI-assisted engineering workflows. Improved platform reliability and reduced MTTR by ~30% at Brightcove.

roles.title: Senior Systems Engineer - Go Backend / Platform Engineering
highlights: Designed and built event-driven Go microservices for a live monitoring platform supporting high-traffic global streaming events, improving scalability, reliability, and failure isolation across distributed production systems.

Built an AI-powered troubleshooting platform using Python and FastAPI, integrating Slack, internal backend APIs, cloud provider APIs, and LangChain to autonomously investigate incidents, correlate signals, and identify probable root causes.
Built secure REST and gRPC platform APIs using hexagonal architecture, Kubernetes RBAC, API Gateway integrations, and service mesh networking to support safe service-to-service communication.
Applied Go concurrency patterns, pub/sub messaging, worker pools, retries, and orchestration workflows to improve resilience across asynchronous backend services.

Developed internal CLI tooling in Go using Cobra and urfave, used across 1000+ multi-tenant environments, improving engineering productivity by 40% and reducing operational friction for internal teams.
Deployed and operated Kubernetes workloads across AWS EKS and GCP GKE using Helm, Terraform, GitHub Actions, and Argo CD GitOps pipelines, improving release consistency and platform reliability.

Established observability and incident response workflows using OpenTelemetry, Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana, Jaeger, CloudWatch, and PagerDuty, improving production visibility and reducing MTTR by ~30%.
Integrated AI-assisted engineering tools including Claude Code, Cursor IDE, ChatGPT, and MCP connectors to analyze logs, review codebases, accelerate debugging, and improve documentation workflows.

roles.title: Systems Engineer - Backend / Cloud Platform
highlights: Built a Go-based authentication and user management service integrating OAuth2, PostgreSQL, Redis caching, and token-based session handling for secure multi-tenant APIs.
Migrated legacy Jenkins pipelines to GitHub Actions and Terraform-based Infrastructure as Code, improving deployment consistency, release velocity, and operational security.
Designed and supported a multi-CDN orchestration platform using Akamai GTM, Fastly, Google Media CDN, Limelight, and CloudFront, supporting over 10M concurrent viewers during major live events.
Developed CloudWatch dashboards, automation scripts, and Kubernetes monitoring workflows to improve infrastructure utilization, production visibility, and incident response.
Led migration of engineering documentation into a centralized mono-repo, improving onboarding efficiency and increasing documentation update speed by ~45%.
